title: debregeasia wallichiana subsp. wallichiana
intro: Debregeasia wallichiana subsp. wallichiana, also known as the Himalayan nettle vine or Debregeasia, is a plant species belonging to the family Urticaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating joint pain due to its anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Debregeasia wallichiana subsp. wallichiana are used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
